---
name: Release checklist
about: Checklist for preparing a release
title: "Release vX.Y.Z"
labels: release
---

## Release checklist

- [ ] Choose release version
- [ ] Update changelog
- [ ] Run tests
- [ ] Build docs
- [ ] Create release branch
- [ ] Tag release
- [ ] Push tag
- [ ] Draft GitHub release
- [ ] Verify artifacts
